sub_modules.fp_unpack: Extracts sign, exponent, fraction, hidden-bit significand, and operand classification bits.
sub_modules.fp_special_cases: Handles NaN, infinity, and zero cases before normal arithmetic.
sub_modules.fp_align: Selects the larger-magnitude operand and right-shifts the smaller significand with sticky-bit preservation.
sub_modules.fp_addsub: Performs signed significand addition or subtraction after exponent alignment.
sub_modules.fp_normalize_round: Normalizes the arithmetic result, applies rounding mode, packs the final value, and generates exception flags.
